transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Tom Bradley. I'm calling because my faucet has no hot water. Dispatcher: Hi Tom, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Rinnai, pretty new, 2 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 101 Pine Street. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out next Monday at 9. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.
